title: Wrecking Ball
why_this_song: Wrecking Ball by Miley Cyrus (2013) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "All you ever did was wreck me"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Don't you ever say I just walked away"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "We jumped, never asking why"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I will always want you"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I will always want you"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I can't live a lie, running for my life
I came in like a wrecking ball
Left me crashing in a blazin' fall
All you ever did was wreck me

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "wreck" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "wreck" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "ever" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "ever" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: We clawed, we chained our hearts in vain
And now, we're ashes on the ground

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: All you ever did was wreck me
I just wanted you to let me in

exercises.prompt_en: "Wrecking Ball" was released in 2013. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Wrecking Ball" foi lançada em 2013. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Wrecking Ball" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Wrecking Ball" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
